subject: New Request: Backend Engineer
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from NordPlay, a company in the gaming space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Backend Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Rust
• Docker Compose
• RabbitMQ

Practical details:
• Start: 2026-01-02
• Duration: 12 months
• Location: Göteborg (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Ida Fredriksson
Account Manager
PeakRecruit
Tel: +46 73 566 78 90
